response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong web/backend credentials, but the role demands native-level Japanese, deep C/UNIX embedded experience, Linux kernel modification skills, and networking security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch chips) — none of which are demonstrated in the resume. C/C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments a decade ago, and there is no Japanese language proficiency listed.
strengths: Senior-level software engineering experience across multiple stacks
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer IDE
Strong testing/TDD discipline and craftsmanship mindset
concerns: No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, MACsec, 802.1X, or L2/L3 networking experience
No Linux kernel investigation or source-modification experience
